title: PacBio (PACB) Tops on Q2 Earnings, Raises FY23 Revenue View
text: PacBio registered Q2 2023 revenues of $47.6 million, up 34.1% year-over-year, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 17.9%. PacBio delivered adjusted loss per share of 26 cents in Q2 2023, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 34 cents per share. Rapid adoption of Revio drove another record quarter as the company grew revenue by 34% compared to Q2 prior year and exceeded $40 million in quarterly revenue for the first time in history with each region posting record revenue. Revio momentum and PacBio's ability to meet customer demand increased their confidence to raise revenue expectations for 2023 to between $185 million and $190 million, representing 44% to 48% growth over 2022. The company made significant progress in expanding their sales and organizational structure during the quarter, adding 11 quota-carrying sales reps in the second quarter and successfully breaking out their Americas and EMEA regions with the hire of Neil Ward as the EMEA General Manager.
